response: This code computes the Levenshtein distance (edit distance) between two strings using dynamic programming. It fills a 2D table where each entry `dp[i][j]` represents the minimum edits (insertions, deletions, substitutions) needed to convert the first `i` characters of string `a` to the first `j` characters of string `b`, then returns the value at `dp[m][n]` (where `m` and `n` are the lengths of `a` and `b`).
